message:
chore: update Cargo.lock dependencies and sync beads issue tracker state

Cargo.lock updated to reflect dependency changes — asupersync switched from
path to registry dependency, removed ring/rustls/x509-parser transitive deps,
added io-uring. Beads issue tracker JSONL synced with latest project state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -319,31 +319,29 @@ dependencies = [
 [[package]]

+source = "registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index"

- "franken-decision 0.2.9",
